summary: Backend-only Task 3 verification completed for RuleSet pre/post scheduling and regression coverage; all executed tests passed.
action_items: No functional fixes required for Task 3.
Optional: add a dedicated unit test for constructor rejection when shift_pre == shift_post in RuleSet.
critical_code_review_comments: RuleSet correctly enforces distinct shifts via ValueError when shift_pre == shift_post.
Boundary logic is correct: post-switch condition is step_id >= switch_step.
Negative step_id handling is centralized in is_post_switch and also enforced through apply.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 tests pass under both pytest and unittest discovery. No regressions found in EpisodeSpec/ShiftRule while validating RuleSet behavior.
rca of the issue: No issue reproduced. Deterministic RuleSet scheduling behavior confirmed. NO MOCKED APIs used.
